title: Happy Spring!
excerpt: It's the official start of my favorite season! I am a big fan of the weather and longer days and general happy feeling that seems to fill the air this time of year. Part of it probably comes from my…
body: It's the official start of my favorite season! I am a big fan of the weather and longer days and general happy feeling that seems to fill the air this time of year. Part of it probably comes from my fond memories of Spring Break and all the joy that come with having a week off. I love experimenting and trying new things, so I hope you enjoy this video which shares a fun little technique.
